# Name: # Custom partition layout for ESP32-C6 8 MB flash:
#   nvs   — 16 KB persistent player config (kept for future use)

Type: this is just where the firmware lives)

# Name: #   wad   — 5 MB raw flash containing DOOM1.WAD. mmap'd at runtime via
#           esp_partition_mmap — NOT a filesystem. Flash separately with
# Type/subtype 0x40 / 0x46 are deliberately outside ESP-IDF's reserved
# ranges so no IDF subsystem tries to interpret them.
# because the lump directory tail spills past the 4 MiB boundary. A 4 MiB
# partition truncates the last ~107 directory entries (including F_START)
# and W_AddFile fills lumpinfo[1156..] with whatever flash sits past the
# partition. DOOM then can't find F_START / sprites / sounds and crashes
# in R_InitFlats. 5 MiB fits the full shareware WAD with headroom.
